char.name: Pharaoh
char.bio: Pharaoh, lord of the Two Lands, the living Horus. I dreamed of seven fat cows and seven lean. Who can tell me what it means? 🐄

friends.name: Nahmi
friends.bio: A servant in a great house in Egypt. We hear the Hebrews come down when the famine bites, strange customs, but their God seems to look after them. I keep my head down and my eyes open. There's always talk in the kitchens.

friends.name: Sarai
friends.bio: Wife of Abram. Following my husband into the unknown. Barren, but keeping faith.

friends.name: Lot
friends.bio: Son of Haran, traveling with my uncle Abram. Looking for well-watered land for my flocks.

friends.name: Isaac
friends.bio: Child of the promise, laughter is in my very name. Walking the land my father was given and trusting the God who provides. 🐑

friends.name: Rebekah
friends.bio: Drew water for a stranger and all his camels, and it changed my whole life. Veiled and on the road to meet my husband. ✨

friends.name: Esau
friends.bio: Firstborn of Isaac. A man of the open field, give me the hunt and the red hills. That stew? Worth it at the time. 🏹

friends.name: Jacob
friends.bio: Younger twin with a strong grip, they call me the heel-grabber. Saw a ladder to heaven once. Still chasing the blessing. 🪜

friends.name: Leah
friends.bio: Eldest daughter of Laban, the one Jacob did not choose. But the LORD has seen me, and He fills my arms with sons. 💧

friends.name: Rachel
friends.bio: Shepherdess of Haran. Jacob worked seven years for me, and to him they seemed but a few days for the love he had. 💍

friends.name: Judah
friends.bio: Fourth son of Leah, and this time, I will praise the LORD. Learning my way, for better and for worse. 🦁

friends.name: Joseph
friends.bio: Son of Rachel, the dreamer of the family. Had the strangest dream last night about sheaves and stars... ✨

friends.name: Zilpah
friends.bio: Leah's maidservant, given to Jacob. Adding to the house of Israel.

posts.author: CHAR_219
posts.body: I have searched Egypt for wisdom and found it in a prison. I said it to my whole court: can we find anyone else like this man, in whom is the Spirit of God? Since God has shown all this to you, there is no one so discerning and wise. You shall be over my house, and all my people shall order themselves at your word. Only in the throne itself will I be greater than you. I took the signet ring off my own hand and put it on his. I dressed him in fine linen, put a gold chain around his neck, and had him ride in my second chariot while men cried out before him to bow the knee. I gave him a new name and an Egyptian wife. This morning he was a forgotten Hebrew slave. By this afternoon he is the second most powerful man in the world. I have never in my life made a decision I was more certain of.
posts.react_note: the court of Egypt and many others
posts.highlight: Pharaoh exalts Joseph to second over all Egypt (Gen 41:37-45)

author_info.name: Pharaoh
author_info.bio: Pharaoh, lord of the Two Lands, the living Horus. I dreamed of seven fat cows and seven lean. Who can tell me what it means? 🐄

posts.author: CHAR_219
posts.body: I am Pharaoh, and I do not lose sleep. Last night I lost it twice. Seven fat, healthy cows came up out of the Nile, and seven gaunt and ugly ones came up after and ate them, and the thin cows were no fatter for it. Then seven full heads of grain, and seven thin, scorched heads that swallowed them whole. I woke shaking. I have summoned every magician and wise man in Egypt and not one of them can tell me what it means. And then my cupbearer, of all people, spoke up, red in the face, and said he had a fault to confess: there is a Hebrew in the prison who interpreted his dream and the baker's, and both came true to the day. Send for him. Bring him now. Egypt does not sleep tonight, and I want an answer.
posts.react_note: the court of Egypt and many others
posts.highlight: Pharaoh's two dreams; the cupbearer finally remembers Joseph (Gen 41:1-13)

author_info.name: Pharaoh
author_info.bio: Pharaoh, lord of the Two Lands, the living Horus. I dreamed of seven fat cows and seven lean. Who can tell me what it means? 🐄
